creator: doctor@doctor.nl2k.ab.ca
text: In both.  The default /usr/local/news/bin/filter_innd.pl will replace /usr/local/news/bin/cleanfeed when a new inn* port update occurs.  I usually have filter_inn.pl as a pointer to cleanfeed.  An updated ports wipes the symbolic link.  Please look in making cleanfeed the default filter_innd.pl
